protein_name: Displays alpha (N-terminal) acetyltransferase activity. Proposed alternative catalytic subunit of the N-terminal acetyltransferase A (NatA) complex. Belongs to the acetyltransferase family. ARD1 subfamily. Present in several cell lines, with highest levels in MCF-7 cells (at protein level). Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Cellular Component: cytoplasm; cytosol; NatA complex; nucleoplasm; nucleus
raw_fields.Molecular Function: acyltransferase activity; acyltransferase activity, transferring groups other than amino-acyl groups; protein binding; protein N-terminal-serine acetyltransferase activity; protein-N-terminal amino-acid acetyltransferase activity; protein-N-terminal-alanine acetyltransferase activity; protein-N-terminal-glutamate acetyltransferase activity; transferase activity
